mechanism: Late-expansion positioning means the economy is vulnerable to any of three cycle-ending pathways. Fiscal floor (condition 1 intact) delays but does not prevent eventual cycle turn. Minsky fragility (condition 3 met) and credit impulse approaching threshold (condition 2) indicate increasing vulnerability.
regime_dependence: Fiscal floor is the critical moderating variable. As long as deficits remain at 6-7% GDP, the fiscal Kalecki channel provides a floor. Pathway activation depends on which condition breaks first.
